title: hymenophyllum × scopulorum
intro: Hymenophyllum × scopulorum is a hybrid fern species, resulting from the cross between Hymenophyllum melleum and Hymenophyllum tunbridgense. As a medicinal plant, it is known to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum × scopulorum include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
